dashboard_settings.title: [Your Company Name] — My Data
dashboard_settings.description: View, export, and manage your personal data at [Your Company Name].

data_categories.name: AI Interaction Data
data_categories.description: Inputs, outputs, and metadata from interactions with AI-powered features. May be used to improve model performance.

data_categories.name: User Content
data_categories.description: Files, documents, and media you upload or create within the service.

data_categories.name: Analytics Data
data_categories.description: Usage data collected to understand how you interact with our service, including page views, clicks, and session duration.

data_categories.name: Payment Data
data_categories.description: Billing and transaction information processed for purchases, including payment method details (handled by our payment processor).

consent_options.name: Essential Services
consent_options.description: Required for the service to function. Cannot be disabled.

consent_options.name: Analytics
consent_options.description: Allow us to collect anonymous usage data to improve our service.

consent_options.name: AI Improvement
consent_options.description: Allow your interactions with AI features to be used for model improvement.

data_endpoints.description: Request a full export of your personal data in machine-readable format (JSON/CSV).
Request deletion of your account and all associated personal data.
Update your consent preferences for optional data processing.
View a summary of all personal data we hold about you.
Request correction of inaccurate personal data.
Request restriction of processing for specific data categories.

rights.name: Right of Access
rights.description: You can request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.

rights.name: Right to Rectification
rights.description: You can request correction of inaccurate personal data.

rights.name: Right to Erasure
rights.description: You can request deletion of your personal data (right to be forgotten).

rights.name: Right to Data Portability
rights.description: You can request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.

rights.name: Right to Restrict Processing
rights.description: You can request that we limit how we process your data.

rights.name: Right to Object
rights.description: You can object to processing based on legitimate interest or direct marketing.
